title: ATDataNDArrayBytes
description: Standard definition for numpy NDArray types in JSON Schema, compatible with atdata WebDataset serialization. This version adds optional dtype, shape, and dimension name annotations.

ndarray.description: Numpy array with optional type and shape annotations.

data.description: Numpy array serialized using numpy .npy format.

shape.description: Expected array shape. Each element is an integer dimension size, or null for variable dimensions.
